title: LiteCoords
description: Lightweight HUD mod showing coordinates, direction, and biome in real time.
body:
## LiteCoords

**LiteCoords** is a lightweight and minimal client-side HUD mod for Fabric that displays your current coordinates, facing direction, and biome directly on screen.

Designed for performance and simplicity, LiteCoords works seamlessly on **Minecraft 1.20.x and 1.21.x** using a multi-version compatible rendering system. No server installation is required — it runs entirely on the client.

### ✨ Features

- Real-time XYZ coordinate display  
- Current facing direction indicator  
- Current biome name  
- Clean and minimal HUD layout  
- Toggle HUD visibility with a single key (default: `O`)  
- Fully client-side  
- Multi-version support (1.20.x & 1.21.x)

LiteCoords is perfect for players who want essential location information without enabling the debug screen (F3). The HUD is lightweight, unobtrusive, and blends naturally into vanilla gameplay.

Whether you're building, exploring, or navigating large worlds, LiteCoords keeps important positional data visible at all times — without clutter.

### Need support?
We have a [Discord Support Server](https://discord.gg/au2qxDap6Y)
